data.description_suggestion: Subscribes to event triggers for Digital Person interactions. Accepts a TriggerCreate request specifying the trigger type and webhook configuration. When the specified event occurs during an interaction, the system will send a notification to the configured webhook endpoint. Returns a TriggerId object containing the subscription ID for future reference. Use this endpoint to set up real-time notifications for interaction events.
data.reasoning: Original summary lacks clarity about what is being subscribed to. Description is completely missing, leaving AI agents unable to understand inputs, outputs, or side effects. Improved version clarifies that this subscribes to interaction events, explains the request structure, describes the webhook notification mechanism, specifies the return value, and provides context for when this operation would be used.

data.description_suggestion: Unsubscribes from a previously subscribed event trigger for Digital Person interactions. Accepts a TriggerId request containing the subscription ID to remove. After unsubscribing, the system will no longer send notifications to the associated webhook endpoint for that trigger. Returns confirmation of the unsubscription. Use this endpoint to stop receiving notifications for specific interaction events.
data.reasoning: Original summary lacks clarity about what is being unsubscribed from.
